meta.title: mefaltauna — trade and buy Panini World Cup 2026 stickers
meta.description: The easiest way to complete your Panini World Cup 2026 album. Trade stickers with fellow collectors or buy them in Colombian pesos.

install.iosStep1: Tap the Share button in Safari's bar.
install.iosStep3: Confirm "Add". mefaltauna will live like an app.

hero.title: Open the pack.
hero.subtitle: Find what you're missing, trade what you've got. Live, with real collectors.

how.title: Three steps. No fluff.
how.intro: Creating an account is free. You only pay when you're ready to list stickers for trade or sale. Zero commission per trade.

mark.title: Mark your album
mark.body: Tell us which stickers you have and which you're missing. Your digital album syncs instantly.
mark.detail: Works offline. Mark duplicates with one tap, missing ones with a double tap. Your progress uploads as soon as you're back online.

match.title: Find someone with your missing one
match.body: We match your list against other collectors and surface the perfect trades.
match.detail: Filter by city, reputation, or sticker type (player, badge, legend, foil). We notify you when someone nearby has a sticker you need.

trade.title: Trade or buy
trade.body: Chat in-app, agree on shipping or meet-up, and complete your album one sticker at a time.
trade.detail: Chat is secure and logged. When both parties confirm the trade or purchase, both gain reputation and your profile levels up.

payment.a: We're integrating Wompi so you can pay in Colombian pesos with card, PSE or Nequi. Until then, signing up and using the app is free.

shipping.a: Each user decides. The most common option in LATAM is in-person delivery in a public spot or shipping via Servientrega. mefaltauna doesn't handle shipping itself — reputation protects users who deliver.

safety.q: How do you protect me from fraud?
safety.a: Every user has public reputation built from completed trades. You can report and block anyone who doesn't deliver. Low-reputation accounts are filtered by default.

panini.q: Does it work with any Panini 2026 album?
panini.a: Yes — the catalog covers the official FIFA World Cup 2026 Panini sticker album: players, badges, legends and shiny specials.

pricing.title: One pass.
pricing.subtitle: No tiers, no fuss. Pay once and unlock all of mefaltauna.
pricing.openHint: → Slide to open the pack and see what's inside.
pricing.disclaimer: Payment in Colombian pesos via Wompi · Coming soon

benefits.findMissing: Find what's missing from your phone

preview.title: A story.
preview.body: Real photo, verified data, one tap to trade or buy. No filters, no middlemen.

album.title: My Album
album.subtitle: Tap a sticker to add it. Tap again to mark duplicates.

paywall.title: Finish your album faster.
paywall.subtitle: Mefaltauna helps you with your World Cup 2026 album: track progress live, publish your duplicates, and trade with other collectors.

publish.title: Publish a sticker
publish.subtitle: Only stickers you have in duplicate can be published. Choose what you want in exchange or set a price.

noDuplicates.title: No duplicates yet
noDuplicates.body: Head back to your album and tap a sticker twice to mark it as a duplicate.

step1.title: 1 · Pick your duplicate
step1.subtitle: Only stickers you have in duplicate or more.

photoStep.title: 2 · Take a photo
photoStep.subtitle: With good light — the photo is what closes the deal.

step3.priceSubtitle: Colombian pesos. Zero commission from mefaltauna.
step3.wantsTitle: 4 · What do you want in exchange?
step3.wantsSubtitle: Open, any sticker from a team, or one specific sticker.

errors.no_duplicates: You don't have that sticker in duplicate anymore.
errors.missing_price: Enter a valid price in COP.
errors.invalid_wants: Pick what you want in exchange.

contact.title: Before you publish, fill in your details
contact.body: So the other person knows who they're dealing with. Only you see these — we share them only when you confirm a trade or sale.
contact.whatsappLockedHint: This is the number you signed up with. It can't be changed here.
contact.privacy: Your data is private. Only shared when you accept a deal.

errors.invalid_phone: Invalid number. Must be a 10-digit Colombian mobile.
errors.not_mobile_phone: Only mobile numbers work, not landlines.
errors.whatsapp_taken: That WhatsApp is already linked to another account.
errors.national_id_taken: That national ID is already linked to another account.

cedula.label: Photo of your national ID
cedula.hint: Take or upload a clear photo of your ID. Whole front visible, no glare. We use it only to verify the collector is real.
cedula.privacyNote: Your ID lives in private storage. Nobody but you sees it, except when support reviews a dispute.

errors.upload_failed: Couldn't upload the photo. Try again.

membership.title: Club pass
membership.subtitle: Activate your pass to chat with any collector, publish every duplicate, and unlock the live feed.
membership.benefitFeed: Live feed of the full catalog
membership.benefitFind: Find what's missing from your phone
membership.disclaimer: Secure checkout via Wompi. Cards, PSE, Nequi, Bancolombia and more.

errors.wompi_not_configured: Payments not enabled yet. Check back soon.
errors.db_error: Couldn't prepare the payment. Try again.

return.title: Payment
return.approvedBody: Your pass is active. You can chat with any collector and publish every sticker.
return.declinedBody: Wompi didn't approve the transaction. Try again with another card or method.
return.pendingBody: Waiting for Wompi to confirm. If you paid, your pass will activate in seconds. Refresh to check.

trade.title: Agreed deal
trade.pickerBody: Tick every sticker the buyer is taking in this meet-up. They all close with a single QR.
trade.pickerFooter: When you're done, hit "Activate deal" above.
trade.noActiveListings: You have no active listings to include. Publish a sticker before activating the deal.
trade.debugNoListings: You have no active listings. Publish one before activating the deal.
trade.debugNoSelection: Tap the chip on the left to pick stickers.
trade.debugReady: Ready: {count} sticker(s) selected. Tap "Activate deal" above.
trade.buyerHint: The seller activated the deal. When you meet in person, scan their QR to close it.
trade.qrTitle: Show this QR to the buyer
trade.qrBody: The buyer scans this code in person, at the moment of the exchange. Once scanned, both of you rate each other.
trade.qrFooter: Single-use and unique. Do not share over chat.
trade.scannerHint: Hold the code in the frame. We detect it and close automatically.
trade.ratingSubtitle: Your reputation is your most valuable asset. Rate the other collector so the community knows who they're playing with.
trade.commentPlaceholder: Tell the squad how the trade went…

errors.not_participant: You're not part of this conversation
errors.caller_not_seller: Only the seller can start the deal
errors.not_buyer: You're not the buyer of this deal
errors.not_party: You're not part of this deal

inbox.title: Messages

paywall.title: Close deals without losing duplicates.
paywall.subtitle: Talk to any collector, agree on the trade in chat, and seal it in person with our single-use QR. Your reputation grows with every closed deal.
paywall.benefitChat: Direct chat with any collector from the feed.
paywall.benefitQr: Secure QR system: seller generates, buyer scans, deal is sealed.
paywall.benefitReputation: Build your reputation. Every closed trade adds stars everyone can see.
paywall.benefitSafe: No spam, no phone-sharing. Everything stays on mefaltauna — we keep you safe.

inbox.paywallBody: Direct chat with collectors requires the club pass. One-time payment of $9,900 COP.
inbox.emptyBody: When someone writes you about a sticker, or you reach out to someone in the feed, your conversations show up here.
inbox.startConversation: Say hi and start the deal.

sendErrors.not_participant: You can't send to this conversation
sendErrors.membership_required: Activate the club pass to chat.

inbox.disclaimerBody: All chat must stay on the platform or your account can be blocked. Do not share emails or WhatsApp numbers.
inbox.piiRejected: Message blocked — it contains a {kind}. Warning {n} of 3.
inbox.blockedNotice: Your account is blocked for sharing contact info. Reach us at hello@mefaltauna.com to review it.

profile.title: My profile
profile.contactHint: Only shared when a deal closes
profile.usernameHint: How others see you in the feed

fut.achievementsLockedTitle: Achievements are part of the club pass.
fut.rookieHint: Head to the album and mark your first sticker to begin.

errors.invalid_phone: Invalid number. Must be a 10-digit Colombian mobile.
errors.not_mobile_phone: Only mobile numbers work, not landlines.
errors.whatsapp_taken: That WhatsApp is already linked to another account.
errors.national_id_taken: That national ID is already linked to another account.

feed.title: Live
feed.subtitle: Every new sticker listed appears here instantly.
feed.empty: No listings from other collectors yet.
feed.emptyMine: You haven't published any sticker yet.

upcomingMatches.title: These are the matches of the World Cup.
upcomingMatches.subtitle: Full group stage, times in your timezone. Tap to see the whole schedule.

matches.title: Every match. Every team.
matches.subtitle: Full group stage. Times render in your device's local timezone.
matches.empty: No matches with that filter. Try another team or group.

signIn.title: Your WhatsApp and a PIN
signIn.subtitle: First time here? You create your PIN right now.
signIn.newAccountNotice: First time here. Pick a PIN you'll remember — you'll need it every time you sign in.
signIn.disclaimer: By continuing you accept the terms. Your data stays private.

errors.invalid_phone: Invalid number. Must be a 10-digit Colombian mobile (e.g. 300 123 4567).
errors.not_mobile_phone: Only mobile numbers work — landlines don't have WhatsApp.
errors.fake_phone: That number doesn't look real. Double-check the digits.
errors.pins_mismatch: PINs don't match. Type them again.
errors.wrong_pin: PIN doesn't match the one saved for this number.
errors.phone_already_registered: This number is already registered. If it's yours, sign in with your current PIN; if you forgot it, recover it below.
errors.signup_failed: Couldn't create the account. Try again.
errors.blocked: Your account is blocked. Reach us at hello@mefaltauna.com.

recoverPin.title: Recover your PIN
recoverPin.subtitle: We verify your national ID against the data from your first publish, then let you set a new PIN. Don't share your national ID with anyone.
recoverPin.nationalIdHint: The same ID you typed when publishing your first sticker.

errors.service_unavailable: Automated recovery isn't enabled in this environment yet. Reach us at hello@mefaltauna.com.
errors.invalid_phone: Invalid number. Must be a 10-digit Colombian mobile.
errors.not_mobile_phone: Only mobile numbers work — landlines don't.
errors.no_match: We couldn't find a profile with that WhatsApp + ID combination.
errors.blocked: That account was blocked by moderation. We can't restore it automatically.
errors.reset_failed: Couldn't change your PIN. Try again.

finalCta.title: Won't complete itself.
finalCta.subtitle: Others already have the ones you need. It's now.

footer.tagline: Got an idea for an app, software or website? We help you ship it.
